project_type: Nx monorepo with Angular frontend, AWS CDK infrastructure, and TypeScript Lambda API
build_system: pnpm + Nx 22.7.3. Workspace packages in apps/* and libs/*. nx.json defines build/lint/test targets with caching.
test_framework: No test runner configured yet (unitTestRunner: none in nx generators). Will use vitest for Lambda/CDK and Angular testing.
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm install to ensure deps. 2. Run pnpm nx build api to verify Lambda compiles. 3. Run pnpm nx build infra to verify CDK compiles. 4. Run pnpm nx build web to verify Angular compiles. 5. Run pnpm cdk synth to verify CDK synthesizes CloudFormation.
setup_instructions: 1. corepack enable. 2. pnpm install. 3. pnpm nx build web (confirms Angular builds). 4. pnpm nx build api (confirms Lambda compiles).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js v22.22.3, pnpm 10.28.1 available. No AWS credentials for actual deployment. Validation is build + synth only.
contribution_requirements: Nx monorepo conventions. Angular standalone components with SCSS. CDK in apps/infra with stacks directory. Lambda in apps/api. Prefix rm- for Angular selectors.
key_patterns: Angular: standalone components, ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, CommonModule imports, provideRouter/provideHttpClient in app.config.ts. CDK: NodejsFunction for Lambda bundling, RestApi with CORS. API: APIGatewayProxyHandler type, CORS headers pattern. tsconfig.base.json paths for cross-project imports. project.json per app with nx:run-commands executor.
directory_structure: Root: nx.json, package.json, tsconfig.base.json, cdk.json. apps/api: Lambda handler with APIGatewayProxy types. apps/infra: CDK app with stacks/. apps/web: Angular 21 standalone app. libs/: empty (workspace for shared libs). dist/: build output.
